title: paspalum aureum
intro: Paspalum aureum, also known as Bahia grass, is a tropical grass species native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Paspalum aureum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve wound healing, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity and limited research on its safety and efficacy.
